not_started.behaviour: All orders placed via AM. No app activity. Goal: first self-serve order.
not_started.variant_a: Buyers in your category ordering themselves get stock 2 days faster — your next restock is ready to place in the app right now.
not_started.variant_b: New in the app: real-time stock levels and saved order templates — everything you need to order independently is one tap.

stalled.behaviour: Placed at least one self-serve order but reverted to AM. Something blocked them.
stalled.variant_a: You already placed a self-serve order — the hardest part is done. Second order takes half the time. Try the next one in the app.
stalled.variant_b: Since your last self-serve order, saved lists and one-tap reorder from history are live — the friction you hit before may be gone.

moving.behaviour: Regularly mixing self-serve with AM orders. Habit forming but not yet default.
moving.variant_a: You're already placing most orders yourself — cross 50% self-serve this month and unlock faster fulfilment across your whole portfolio.
moving.variant_b: New: reorder your full order history in one tap from the app — buyers using it cut their weekly sourcing time by 40%.

nearly_graduated.behaviour: Majority self-serve. One nudge away from full graduation.
nearly_graduated.variant_a: You're majority self-serve already — one more order placed yourself and you've crossed the line. Faster fulfilment, fully in control.
nearly_graduated.variant_b: Last feature to unlock: order templates in the app — save your regular restocks so each one takes under 60 seconds.

video_call.trigger: ss_browser — placed orders but no offers or chat yet
video_call.variant_a: Buyers who book a video call before their next order convert 3× more — see the stock live before committing, not after.
video_call.variant_b: A few video call slots left this week — buyers who see stock on a call spend 30% more per session. 15 mins before anyone else commits.

offer.trigger: ss_consideration — active on offers and chat but low order volume
offer.variant_a: Suppliers move stock daily — the price on items you've been viewing won't hold. Make an offer in the app now and lock it in.
offer.variant_b: Buyers who make an offer get a supplier response within 4 hours on average — one offer in the app and the deal is halfway done.

bundle.trigger: ss_purchase — regular buyer, 2+ orders, high engagement
bundle.variant_a: Buyers at your order volume who switch to bundles save 18% and cut fulfilment time by 2 days — set one up on your next restock.
bundle.variant_b: 9 in 10 buyers at your level who try bundles don't go back to single orders — faster, cheaper, one less thing to manage each week.

chat.trigger: ss_reengagement — high past GMV, now quiet
chat.variant_a: New stock has come in matching what you were buying before — your order history is live, start a chat in the app to pick it up.
chat.variant_b: Buyers in your category are placing early-season orders now and best stock goes fast — open the app and start a chat before shortages hit.
